name: hooked
description: Design habit-forming products with Nir Eyal's Hook Model ("Hooked", 2014). One router skill plus a sub-skill per phase — Trigger, Action, Variable Reward, Investment — and a Habit Testing & Ethics skill (Habit Testing, 5% rule, cohort analysis, Manipulation Matrix). Use for engagement, retention, onboarding, notifications, feeds, and gamification decisions.
